name: Visa and Residency
title: Qatar Visa and Residency Hub
metaDescription: Visa and residency guides for expats in Qatar: work visa, RP process, reforms, and family sponsorship basics.
intro: Editorially curated visa and residency guidance for moving to Qatar, staying compliant, and planning paperwork with fewer surprises.

name: Housing and Rent
title: Doha Housing and Rent Hub
metaDescription: Doha housing and rent guides: neighborhood comparisons, rental pricing, and practical cost planning for expats.
intro: A practical housing hub covering where to rent, what to budget, and how to compare neighborhoods and lease tradeoffs in Doha.

name: Metro and Transit
title: Doha Metro and Transit Hub
metaDescription: Doha Metro and transit guides: network map, fares, and airport connectivity for daily commuting and travel.
intro: Use this transit hub to understand Doha Metro lines, fare options, and airport-linked mobility planning.

name: Airport and Layovers
title: Hamad Airport and Doha Layover Hub
metaDescription: Airport, layover, and Doha highlights guides: Hamad transfers, stopovers, short itineraries, and city experiences worth prioritizing.
intro: A broad airport and layover cluster for transit planning, stopover logistics, and high-value Doha experiences between flights.

name: Jobs and Salaries
title: Qatar Jobs and Salary Hub
metaDescription: Jobs and salary guides for expats in Qatar: hiring trends, compensation benchmarks, labor rules, and payout calculations.
intro: A curated jobs cluster focused on getting hired, understanding compensation, and navigating labor and payout rules in Qatar.

name: Cost of Living
title: Doha Cost of Living Hub
metaDescription: Cost-of-living guides for Doha and Gulf comparisons: housing, groceries, telecom, banking, and monthly budgeting.
intro: Use this hub to benchmark living costs in Doha and compare recurring expenses that shape expat budgeting decisions.
